title: 文件夹平均评分
visualBaseline: pending: legacy 1920x1080 characterization has not been generated
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype and a scripted 1920x1080 legacy characterization are preserved; global and explicit-path folder-rating cache operations, count and last-updated state, recalculate/export/confirmed-clear controls, bounded current-directory statistics, failure and cancellation states, shared persistence and responsive evidence are all covered. The current-directory projection alone remains partial.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: The path input must be a controlled React field before the legacy calculate-for-path action can be restored.
XR currently opens a private bounded Reader directory session and requests only the rating projection; a canonical global cache application contract is still missing.

sourceUiInventory.title: 缓存说明、数量和更新时间
acceptanceItems: 说明评分来自 EMM 数据库文件夹平均评分缓存
显示 Star 图标
显示缓存条目数量
存在更新时间时显示本地化 lastUpdated

sourceUiInventory.title: 重算、导出和清除缓存
acceptanceItems: 重算按钮使用 RefreshCcw 图标
重算期间显示更新中并禁用
重算 tooltip 说明计算全部文件夹
导出按钮使用 Download 图标
空缓存禁用导出
导出格式为带缩进 JSON 且文件名包含时间戳
清除按钮使用 Trash2 destructive 语义
空缓存禁用清除
清除前显示确认对话框

sourceUiInventory.title: 按路径补充分级评分
acceptanceItems: 路径文本输入
空路径禁用补充按钮
更新中禁用补充按钮
tooltip 说明根据子文件夹评分补充该路径

sourceUiInventory.title: XR 当前目录有界统计
acceptanceItems: 从当前书籍路径解析所在目录
显示当前目录平均评分
显示有评分条目数和总条目数
每页最多 256 项且总计最多 2048 项
达到上限时明确显示截断状态

sourceUiInventory.title: 加载、错误、刷新和 Card 生命周期
acceptanceItems: 未打开书籍显示空态
读取书籍路径和统计目录时显示独立 loading
目录统计失败显示 alert 和重试
Card 隐藏时零请求
卸载和重新激活取消旧请求并关闭私有目录 session

items.title: 当前书籍所在目录评分摘要
items.targetContract: Resolve the active book directory and render a bounded average plus rated/total counts from directory entry rating projections without recursively scanning from React.
items.notes: XR currently renders the average and counts, but not the legacy rating distribution or the distinction between inherited/default and explicit ratings.

items.title: 全局与三级父目录评分缓存
items.targetContract: Recalculate the legacy global folder-rating cache, including the source-defined parent-folder aggregation boundary, and expose stable count and last-updated metadata through one canonical application service.
items.notes: The private current-directory session is not a replacement for the old global cache or its parent-folder semantics.

items.title: 导出和确认清除评分缓存
items.targetContract: Export the canonical cache as formatted JSON and clear it only after destructive confirmation, with disabled states for an empty cache.
items.notes: Neither export nor cache mutation is present in the current React Card.

items.title: 按显式路径补充评分
items.targetContract: Accept a validated path and supplement its rating from child-folder values without creating a browser-owned cache or bypassing the application boundary.
items.notes: The controlled path input and supplement command remain absent.

items.title: 加载、空值、截断、错误与重试
items.targetContract: Keep metadata loading, directory loading, no-rated-entry, bounded truncation, recoverable failure and retry states distinct while preserving the last same-directory snapshot where safe.
items.notes: Current tests cover the successful current-directory flow and hidden zero work; error, retry and truncation evidence remain.

items.title: 私有目录 session 的取消与释放
items.targetContract: Hidden Cards perform zero work; activation opens one private directory session, cancellation ignores stale results, and every success, failure or unmount path closes the session.
items.notes: The focused test proves success cleanup; an explicit abort/failure cleanup test is still required for complete evidence.

items.title: 有界分页与零隐藏工作
items.targetContract: Request only rating fields in 256-entry pages, stop at 2048 entries, avoid recursive UI work and perform no request while inactive.
items.notes: Implementation bounds are present; a multi-page boundary test remains.

items.title: 命名状态与键盘命令
items.targetContract: Expose loading and result summaries through stable semantic roles and give refresh, export, clear and path-fill commands unique accessible names, keyboard operation and coherent disabled states.
items.notes: Refresh and status text use native controls, but the missing legacy commands and state announcements prevent completion.

items.title: 旧缓存控制密度与受限几何
items.targetContract: Preserve the source description/count/actions/path-input hierarchy and compact icon-button density while fitting desktop and constrained Cards without overflow.
items.notes: Target screenshots prove the current summary does not overflow, but the legacy action and path rows are absent and no legacy screenshot exists.

items.title: 记录当前目录统计替代范围
items.targetContract: Document that the first XR slice provides an ephemeral current-directory projection, not the legacy persistent global and parent-folder rating cache, and keep the missing commands visible as pending work.
items.notes: This compatibility file records the gap; it does not accept removal of the legacy cache operations.
